categories.title: Magnets
categories.label: Magnet
categories.section_copy: Prague and Czech-theme magnets arranged for souvenir retail, museum shops, and visitor stores that want gift-ready designs instead of generic tourist clutter.
categories.page_intro: A flexible magnet range for Prague and Czech souvenir merchandising. Suitable for low-MOQ testing, mixed display racks, and category expansion after initial sell-through.
categories.default_note: Suitable for souvenir shops, museum shops, visitor stores, and low-MOQ product testing.

categories.title: Bottle Openers
categories.label: Bottle opener
categories.section_copy: Functional Prague-theme bottle openers that give stores a practical souvenir line with stronger everyday-use value and easy trial-order potential.
categories.page_intro: Bottle openers are useful when a store wants souvenir products with a practical angle. Good for tourist counters, beer-focused gift corners, and low-risk assortment testing.
categories.default_note: Suitable for souvenir shops, museum shops, visitor stores, and low-MOQ product testing.

categories.title: Keychains
categories.label: Keychain
categories.section_copy: Portable Prague and Czech souvenir accessories designed for tourist impulse purchase displays, add-on sales, and small-footprint merchandising.
categories.page_intro: A practical category for tourist counters and compact display zones. Suitable for low-MOQ testing, numbering, series development, and mixed impulse-purchase assortments.
